description_long: This is a modern smartwatch with a rectangular face and rounded edges, featuring a sleek, minimalist design. The display is a light gray digital screen with four circular app icons, each outlined in black and accented with vibrant colors such as green, red, and yellow. The watch case appears to be made of a smooth, glossy material, likely ceramic or aluminum, with a matching light gray silicone or rubber strap that curves comfortably around the wrist. A prominent crown with a red accent is visible on the right side, along with a side button below it. The strap has a pin-and-tuck closure, ensuring a secure fit. The overall aesthetic is contemporary and functional, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A sleek, rectangular smartwatch with a light gray digital display, colorful app icons, and a smooth light gray strap. The design is modern and minimalist, with a prominent crown and secure closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display with four colorful app icons and minimalist hour markers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red-accented crown, side button, and the smooth curvature of the strap.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the continuous, seamless strap and the pin-and-tuck closure system.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the case profile, strap attachment, and absence of buttons on this side.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is a digital display with a light gray background, featuring minimalist black tick markers for hours and four prominent circular app icons in black with colored accents. The style is modern and functional, with no numerals or decorative textures.
attribute_strap_type: Integrated silicone or rubber strap with a smooth, continuous design and pin-and-tuck closure.
attribute_watch_face_display: Digital display with four main app icons, minimalist hour markers, and no analog hands. The interface is touch-responsive and designed for smart functionality.
